quote: Contemplation often makes life miserable.  We should act more, think less, and stop watching ourselves live. – Nicolas Chamfort
fact: During the chariot scene in "Ben Hur," a small red car can be seen in the distance.
joke: Why do crabs never give to charity? Because they’re shellfish.
